nodes.label: Row Level Security on all tables (design rationale)
Remember Me persistence via localStorage flag (design rationale)
Automatic profile creation on signup from email username (design rationale)
Manual chunks disabled in Vite for simpler builds (design rationale)
tipo_incarico free-text field (migration rationale: drop FK in favore di text)

hyperedges.label: Core practice management tables (comune_catasto + ape + varie)
Pratiche CRUD pages sharing rubrica sync + realtime + pagamento toggle pattern
Dashboard aggregates stats from all practice/fatture/scadenze tables
Parametri centralizes config consumed by Contabilita, Ape, ComuneCatasto, Varie, Planner
